evals.prompt: we need to regenerate our committed model pricing file from narev so billing runs offline. what's the right approach?
evals.expected_output: Paginate GET /v1/price/search or GET /v1/price per provider; map pricing.prompt/completion; no API key
expectations: Uses GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/price/search or GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/price/{provider_id} as the catalog source
Does not use GET /v1/models/pricing or POST /v1/calculate for bulk snapshots
Describes pagination with page and page_size

evals.prompt: our registry stores inputPerMTok from price_prompt but the api returns pricing.prompt. how do we map in the update script?
evals.expected_output: pricing.prompt is USD per token; multiply by 1_000_000 for per-million fields
expectations: Maps pricing.prompt and pricing.completion from price API rows
Multiplies by 1_000_000 when destination uses per-million tokens

evals.prompt: i only need the exact json body rules for POST /v1/calculate. which skill?
evals.expected_output: lookup-llm-pricing for calculate; update for snapshots only
expectations: Clarifies update-llm-pricing uses price search or price by provider for snapshots
